headline: Top Stock Reports for Oracle, T-Mobile & Gilead
summary: Oracle's cloud infrastructure revenue jumped 84% in fiscal Q3 as AI and multicloud demand surged, though heavy data-center investments pushed trailing free cash flow to -$13.2B.
